channel.title: Wanxiang on Chen Kai Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Wanxiang on Chen Kai Blog

item.title: Aliyun Bailian (4): Wanxiang Video Generation End-to-End
item.description: Wanxiang is the API that has done the most for our marketing pipeline and caused the most production surprises. The model is genuinely good — wan2.5-t2v-plus produces 720p clips that pass for an actual video team’s output most of the time — but the surface around it is async, native-protocol, has expiring URLs, and rate-limits in non-obvious ways. This article is the version of the docs that has been through six months of “why is this happening at 2am” tickets.
